title: senecio altoandinus
intro: Senecio altoandinus, also known as the Alto Andes Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio altoandinus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to alleviate colds, fever, and bronchitis.
